name: execution_date
label: Execution Date
hint: Select date of execution of the agreement

name: execution_place
label: Execution Place
hint: Enter city and state where agreement is executed

name: assignor_name
label: Assignor Name
hint: Enter full legal name of assignor

name: assignor_address
label: Assignor Address
hint: Enter complete address of assignor

name: assignor_type
label: Assignor Type
hint: Select type of assignor

name: assignor_representative_name
label: Assignor Representative Name
hint: Enter the name of the authorized signatory for the assignor

name: assignor_representative_designation
label: Assignor Representative Designation
hint: Enter designation such as Director, Partner, or Authorized Signatory

name: assignor_llp_representative_name
label: Assignor LLP Representative Name
hint: Enter the name of the partner or authorized signatory for the assignor LLP

name: assignor_llp_representative_designation
label: Assignor LLP Representative Designation
hint: Enter designation such as Designated Partner or Authorized Signatory

name: assignor_pan
label: Assignor PAN
hint: Enter PAN of the assignor, if applicable

name: assignor_gst
label: Assignor GST
hint: Enter GST number of the assignor, if applicable

name: assignee_name
label: Assignee Name
hint: Enter full legal name of assignee

name: assignee_address
label: Assignee Address
hint: Enter complete address of assignee

name: assignee_type
label: Assignee Type
hint: Select type of assignee

name: assignee_representative_name
label: Assignee Representative Name
hint: Enter the name of the authorized signatory for the assignee

name: assignee_representative_designation
label: Assignee Representative Designation
hint: Enter designation such as Director, Partner, or Authorized Signatory

name: assignee_llp_representative_name
label: Assignee LLP Representative Name
hint: Enter the name of the partner or authorized signatory for the assignee LLP

name: assignee_llp_representative_designation
label: Assignee LLP Representative Designation
hint: Enter designation such as Designated Partner or Authorized Signatory

name: assignee_pan
label: Assignee PAN
hint: Enter PAN of the assignee, if applicable

name: assignee_gst
label: Assignee GST
hint: Enter GST number of the assignee, if applicable

name: agreement_title
label: Agreement Title
hint: Enter title of agreement (e.g., IP Assignment Agreement)

name: assignment_type
label: Assignment Type
hint: Select the primary type of assignment

name: assigned_rights
label: Assigned Rights/Obligations
hint: Clearly describe rights, title, interest, or obligations being assigned

name: schedule_of_assets_ip
label: Schedule of Assets / Intellectual Property
hint: Provide a detailed schedule of the property, assets, or IP being assigned

name: assignment_scope
label: Scope of Assignment
hint: Specify scope, limitations, or conditions of assignment

name: registration_numbers
label: Registration Numbers
hint: Enter patent, trademark, copyright, or other registration/application numbers

name: moral_rights_waiver
label: Moral Rights Waiver
hint: State whether the author or creator waives moral rights to the extent permitted by law

name: further_assurance
label: Further Assurance
hint: State that the assignor will execute future documents needed to perfect title

name: consideration_amount
label: Consideration Amount
hint: Enter amount (if any) paid for assignment

name: consideration_details
label: Consideration Details
hint: Describe payment terms (lump sum, installments, etc.)

name: payment_timeline
label: Payment Timeline
hint: Select when the consideration will be paid

name: mode_of_payment
label: Mode of Payment
hint: Select the mode of payment

name: effective_from
label: Effective From
hint: Select effective date of assignment

name: term_duration
label: Term / Duration
hint: Enter duration of agreement (if applicable)

name: representations_warranties
label: Representations & Warranties
hint: Enter declarations by assignor regarding ownership and authority

name: indemnity_clause
label: Indemnity Clause
hint: Specify indemnity obligations, if any

name: notice_details
label: Notice Details
hint: Enter email addresses and physical addresses for service of legal notices

name: dispute_resolution
label: Dispute Resolution Method
hint: Select whether disputes will be resolved through litigation or arbitration

name: number_of_arbitrators
label: Number of Arbitrators
hint: Select the arbitral tribunal structure

name: seat_of_arbitration
label: Seat of Arbitration
hint: Enter the legal seat of arbitration (city)

name: governing_law
label: Governing Law
hint: Enter applicable law (e.g., Laws of India)

name: jurisdiction
label: Jurisdiction
hint: Enter court jurisdiction (city/state)

name: termination_clause
label: Termination Clause
hint: Specify conditions under which agreement can be terminated
